source_pr.title: store/tikv: move isolation test to tests
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?
store/tikv has dependencies on `mockstore` and `unistore` because tests need to use them. We can resolve it by moving all tests to standaline package.

Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:
- move test files into `store/tikv/tests`

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

symptoms: The test suite is too slow under `go test -race` (race detector overhead) and can time out / become flaky
failure_signature: test suite takes too long under the race detector (timeout/slow execution under -race)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to timing/timeout sensitivity under the race detector: `-race` significantly slows execution, and the isolation-related test suite can become unstable or exceed time limits when race instrumentation is enabled. This PR stabilizes it by moving the isolation test into the standalone `store/tikv/tests` package and adjusting the suite so slow/race-sensitive parts do not run (or do not dominate) under `go test -race`.
fix_pattern: Isolate slow tests and prevent race-detector-induced timeouts (split/move suites; optionally exclude slow parts under `-race`).

evidence: evidence: // The test suite takes too long under the race detector.
